name: Miles and More Credit Card
joiningBenefits: 5,000 welcome Award Miles upon first transaction within 30 days of card activation
renewalBenefits: 3,000 annual renewal bonus Award Miles upon payment of the annual fee
additionalBenefits: Award Miles do not expire as long as the card account remains active
1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions between ₹400 and ₹4,000, capped at ₹400 per billing cycle
Complimentary Dining Delights program benefits at participating restaurants
additionalDetails: Award Miles can be redeemed for flight bookings and upgrades on Lufthansa, Swiss, Austrian, Brussels Airlines, Eurowings, and all Star Alliance partner airlines.
Miles can also be redeemed for hotel reservations, car rentals, merchandise on the Lufthansa Worldshop, or charitable donations via the Miles & More portal.
internalNotes: Axis Bank Miles & More Credit Card is offered in World and World Select variants.
This file represents the World variant (annual/joining fee of ₹3,500).
The World Select variant has a joining fee of ₹10,000, annual fee of ₹4,500, welcome bonus of 15,000 miles, annual renewal bonus of 4,000 miles, and earns 6 miles per ₹200 spent.

Complimentary domestic lounge access (4 visits/quarter) requires spends of ₹50,000 in the previous 3 calendar months. New cardholders are exempt from this criteria for the month of card issuance and the next 3 calendar months.
Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-13.
